subject: (no subject)
body: Please provide me the names of the two architect firms that you have used.. I thinkyou should immediatley come to the island so you can see for yourself. .......I was surprisedm though promised to have a rendering simialr to the morrocan plans, and a layout in similar style, that all I received was cad-cam drawings. IT is urgent that you see these plans, that I have waited for, months , on the isalnd with me,, I will wait for your arrival.
